description_for_human: Nebula Forge supply chain & logistics — cargo tracking, inventory management, supply ordering, and storage capacity monitoring.
description_for_model: This plugin provides tools for supply chain and logistics operations aboard the Nebula Forge station. It can list and track cargo shipments, query inventory levels with low-stock warnings, create supply orders, and check storage bay capacity utilization. Use it when users ask about shipments, inventory, supplies, storage, or cargo.

conversation_starters.text: Show inventory levels for medical supplies
Create an emergency supply order for fuel
